name: Rabbit Fried
recipeIngredient: Rabbit, cleaned and cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
If it is a young rabbit, proceed with the recipe. For an older, tougher rabbit, boil in saltwater until tender.
1. Lightly brown onions in cooking oil.
2. Dredge rabbit pieces in flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Put in a hot skillet with oil and onions and cook until brown on both sides.
4. Remove meat from the skillet and make gravy by sprinkling the remaining flour from dredging into the oil.
5. Cook until brown.
6. Add 1 1/2 cups water and return rabbit to the mixture. Cook slowly until the gravy thickens.
